prestazioni: VR30DDTT (3.0L twin-turbo V6) engine: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbos (62mm compressor, 76mm turbine) paired with custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipes (CPE Motorsport) and a Tomei 3.5" titanium exhaust system with 100-cell catalytic converters for 550whp on 93 octane (stock internals safe)

VR30DDTT fuel system: Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors with a Radium Engineering dual fuel pump hanger (Walbro 450 LPH pumps) and a PRL Motorsports port injection kit (Methanol compatible) for E85 blends up to 50%, managed via Cobb Accessport V3 with custom VR30DDTT-specific Stage 3+ tune by COBB Tuning (Atlanta, GA)

VR30DDTT drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (Q60-specific 3.133 final drive ratio) with a Z1 Motorsports upgraded driveshaft (carbon fiber, 1450whp rated) and a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily twin-disc clutch (26-spline, 6-pad) for 600+ ft-lb torque capacity
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS Q60 widebody kit (Type 2, 30mm extended fenders) with custom carbon fiber front splitter (Seibon Carbon) and a Varis Arising II rear diffuser (Q60-specific, 3D-printed ABS construction)
Rocket Bunny V3.5 aero kit (Q60 coupe-specific) with custom matte gunmetal paint (PPG Deltron DBC) and OEM-style carbon fiber side skirts (AIT Racing, pre-preg autoclave cured)

Work Meister S1 3P 19x10.5 +25 front / 19x12 +35 rear wheels (matte black finish) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/19 front, 305/30/19 rear) and KW Suspension Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, Q60-specific valving, 10kg/mm front / 12kg/mm rear springs)
